markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss candidate selection process and strategies for hiring Managing Editors.](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team is using a mix of inbound applications and outbound recruiting to find high-quality candidates](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [An AI-powered screening process has been implemented to help filter applications more efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [The team is balancing between finding experienced candidates now and developing a pipeline for future talent](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Unique, engaging, and concise application responses are standing out in the review process](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Screening Process

  - [Implemented AI-powered initial screening for applications, categorizing as "Yes," "Maybe," or "No"](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [AI screening looks for recognized companies, practical experience, SEO experience, and writing quality](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Manual review still necessary, especially for borderline cases](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [$500 spent on job postings across multiple boards to increase applicant pool](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Well-Found noted as a potentially good source for candidates](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)

### Evaluation Criteria

  - [U.S. candidates held to highest standards due to salary expectations (e.g., $60k/year insufficient for NYC)](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Slightly lower bar for Canadian applicants](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Emphasis on unique, engaging, and concise application responses](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Technical background (e.g., ML observability, AI) viewed favorably for potential technical editor roles](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Writing samples and past work (e.g., fiction writing) considered in evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)

### Outbound Recruiting

  - [Marcel conducted targeted outreach to potential candidates](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Shared 5 LinkedIn candidates in leadership channel for review](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)

### Application Response Analysis

  - [Standout responses:](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Use of AI (e.g., Nick Yaml bot) with transparency](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
      - [Concise, to-the-point answers](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
      - [Engaging, "cliffhanger" style writing](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Unique openings that grab attention](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Red flags:](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Generic or AI-generated responses without originality](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Lack of relevant experience combined with bland answers](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [Potential language barriers (e.g., heavy accents) considered for certain roles](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Future Hiring Strategy

  - [Current focus on finding experienced candidates (3-4 years in)](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Long-term goal to develop a pipeline for identifying talent earlier in their careers](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Considering adjusting expectations (e.g., 50,000 words/month) in job postings](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [Potential to become known as a "sales university" equivalent for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue reviewing applications using both AI screening and manual assessment](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Refine AI screening prompt to better capture uniqueness and originality in responses](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Follow up with promising candidates, particularly those who submitted video responses](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
  - [Consider expanding the talent pool by looking into technical editor roles for candidates with strong domain expertise](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Review and potentially adjust job posting details (e.g., word count expectations) for future listings](https://fathom.video/share/KzAWjASu8NoH5ngC7FpfNdKKMpfGt_Sz?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
